MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-08-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PATEL, NAVNIT G.

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 612, EVERETT HEWLETT, JUDGE; C. GEHLING, CLERK; TEANNA WARD, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY DMENDEZ, ESQ. DEF APPR BY JSTRINGER, ESQ. MATTER SETTLES BEFORE TRIAL DEFENDANT JAMAL HASOON TO RETAIN POSSESSION OF 905 COLUMBUS ST #210 PROVIDED HE PAYS PLNTF NAVNIT G. PATEL $410 NLT MAY 9, 2000, $110 TO BE CREDITED FOR WEEKLY RENT AND $300 TOWARD BACK RENT TOTAL OF $1776. EFF MAY 15, 2000 AND EACH WEEK THEREAFTER, DEF SHALL PAY PLNTF $410 APPLIED AS ABOVE UNTIL CURRENT. IF BREACHED, PLNTF MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION AND BALANCE DUE.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTERING UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION- GRANTED- JUDGE GARCIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASOON, JAMAL A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS AVE, #210, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94133 $1,476.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,476.00, LEASE FORFEITED
